Motion: Regarding Outcome Of The Appeal From The Affirmation Of The Decision Dated January 22, 2002 Suspending Petitioner'S Driver'S License
Off Calendar Jan-22-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John Lee, Esq. 863-4336 for Plaintiff MARK A. SANGIACOMO petitioning for a writ of mandate
Raymond W. Hamilton, Deputy Attorney General 510/622-2223 for Respondent STEVEN GOURLEY, DIRECTOR OF THE DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES

Argued and the Court DENIED the petition for writ of mandamus. Mr. Hamilton's request to amend the Answer on its faced granted as follows:
Page 2, Line 11 -- the amount should be amended to reflect $203.00 instead of $200.00.
Page 2, Line 12 -- should be San Francisco county instead of San Mateo county.

(JJM/md) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
